caption:
I absolutely adore this authentic Korean Cafe in Wafi City that I came back to try more special blends three times in a month! 🥰

📍 @bando_coffee_house 
☕️ Signature coffee at 25 AED 
🥧 Light bites at 20 AED onwards
❤️ What we love: Matcha, Spring coffee, Winter coffee, basil scones, madeleines, turkey club sandwich
